title: A Bioconductor workflow for the Bayesian analysis of spatial proteomics.
author: Crook OM Breckels LM Lilley KS Kirk PDW Gatto L
content: S-EPMC6509962 PMC6509962 A Bioconductor workflow for the Bayesian analysis of spatial proteomics. Knowledge of the subcellular location of a protein gives valuable insight into its function. The field of spatial proteomics has become increasingly popular due to improved multiplexing capabilities
